channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Marcos Outlines LEAD-SAIL-RISE Framework at 48th ASEAN Summit Retreat
item.description: Philippine President Ferdinand Marcos Jr., in his opening statement at the 48th ASEAN Summit retreat in Cebu, emphasized the importance of regional cooperation in navigating global uncertainties. High...

item.title: US and Iran Forces Clash Amid Pending Peace Proposal Response
item.description: The United States is anticipating a response from Iran to its latest peace proposal aimed at ending the ongoing conflict in the Gulf. Despite ongoing negotiations suggesting a potential breakthrough, ...

item.title: Patriots Stand by Mike Vrabel Despite Ongoing Controversy Involving Dianna Russini
item.description: Mike Vrabel, head coach of the New England Patriots, faced public scrutiny following allegations of an affair with NFL reporter Dianna Russini. Although the rumors drew significant attention after pho...

item.title: Five Terrorists Killed in Tank and DI Khan Operations, ISPR Confirms
item.description: According to the Inter-Services Public Relations (ISPR), Pakistan's security forces successfully neutralised five terrorists in Khyber Pakhtunkhwa’s districts of Tank and Dera Ismail Khan during intel...

item.title: Usman Steps In to Mediate Between Allan and Marcus in Episode 25 of Blood vs Duty
item.description: In the latest episode of ABS-CBN's popular series 'Blood vs Duty,' tensions rose as Allan and Marcus found themselves in a heated disagreement. The conflict escalated quickly, capturing the attention ...

item.title: Court extends judicial custody of accused in IRS officer's daughter's murder case
item.description: In New Delhi, the Saket Court on Friday extended the judicial custody of Rahul Meena by four more days in connection with the murder case of a senior Indian Revenue Service (IRS) officer's daughter. T...

item.title: Starmer faces difficult election results, leadership challenges diminish
item.description: The latest election results have presented a challenging scenario for Labour leader Keir Starmer, with his party suffering setbacks across key regions. Despite early speculation about possible leaders...

item.title: US panel urges designation of India for religious freedom violations
item.description: WASHINGTON: The United States Commission on International Religious Freedom (USCIRF) has recommended again that the US State Department declare India as a 'country of particular concern' due to seriou...

item.title: Tensions Escalate in Iran-US Conflict Amid Renewed Strikes and Diplomatic Stalemate
item.description: Tensions between Iran and the United States remain high as both nations engage in renewed military actions while diplomatic efforts hang by a thread. Iranian Foreign Minister Abbas Araghchi accused th...

item.title: TVK Forms Tamil Nadu's First Coalition Government with Ministerial Berths for Allies VCK and Left Parties
item.description: Superstar Vijay's Tamilaga Vettri Kazhagam (TVK) is set to lead Tamil Nadu's first-ever coalition government after securing a majority in the assembly elections. TVK won 108 seats on its own and has r...

item.title: AWS data center outage in North Virginia affects Coinbase and CME trading platforms
item.description: On May 7, 2026, Amazon Web Services (AWS) experienced a significant outage at one of its data center zones in northern Virginia, leading to disruptions for major platforms such as Coinbase and the CME...

item.title: ASEAN Leaders Express Frustration Over Slow Progress in Resolving Myanmar Crisis
item.description: During the culmination of the 48th ASEAN Summit held in Lapu-Lapu City, Cebu, President Ferdinand “Bongbong” Marcos Jr. discussed the persistent challenges facing Myanmar after the 2021 military coup....

item.title: Former U.S. Defense Contractor Sentenced to Pay $10 Million for Selling Hacking Tools to Russian Firm
item.description: Peter Williams, a former head of the hacking and surveillance technology division at U.S. defense contractor L3Harris, has been ordered to pay $10 million in restitution to his former employer, on top...

item.title: Suvendu Adhikari Selected as West Bengal CM: BJP's Strategic Choice Explained
item.description: Suvendu Adhikari has been chosen as the Bharatiya Janata Party's (BJP) Chief Ministerial candidate in West Bengal, following his emergence as the party's strongest anti-Mamata Banerjee leader. Adhikar...

item.title: Counties to Receive Sh10.5 Billion from Road Maintenance Levy under Proposed Funding Model
item.description: The Ministry of Roads and Transport has proposed a new model to share the Road Maintenance Levy Fund (RMLF) with county governments, which could see them receiving Sh10.5 billion. Under the proposal, ...

item.title: Federal Budget 2026 Introduces Reforms to Reduce Red Tape and Boost Business Productivity
item.description: The 2026 Federal Budget, announced by Treasurer Jim Chalmers, aims to significantly reduce red tape and boost productivity for Australian businesses. The measures are expected to save companies thousa...

item.title: Escalating Israeli Attacks Raise Concerns Over Civilian Safety and International Law in Lebanon
item.description: In late April 2026, Lebanese journalist Amal Khalil was killed in a double-tap Israeli strike in southern Lebanon, marking the ninth journalist death in the country this year. Lebanese leaders condemn...

item.title: Olivia and Liam retain top positions in US baby name rankings for 2025, while Eliana enters top 10
item.description: For the seventh consecutive year, Olivia and Liam have held the top spots as the most popular baby names in the United States, according to the Social Security Administration’s annual data. Each year,...

item.title: Alex Eala advances to Italian Open third round with win over Wang Xinyu
item.description: Filipina tennis sensation Alex Eala has made a significant stride on clay courts by advancing to the third round of the 2026 Italian Open, marking her first time reaching this stage in a WTA Tour clay...

item.title: Canada's unemployment rises to six-month high with full-time job losses in April
item.description: Canada's labour market experienced a slowdown in April, with the country shedding 18,000 jobs and the unemployment rate rising to its highest level in six months. The decline was primarily in full-tim...
